meaning: n.南非白人,布尔人(指南非的荷兰人等欧洲移民的后裔)
examples: Laing was a black child born in the 1950s to a white Afrikaner couple.
He builds an Afrikaner mythology of mundanity that echoes a realism of social profundity.
As it turned out, my greatest challenge would be the incredible bias of my conservative Afrikaner family.
The game is not an incidental part of Afrikaner culture, like cricket is to the English.
But with his greatest achievement behind him, the 61-year-old Afrikaner has been powerless to halt his own party's decline.
